side_effects.description: Vertical fine lines appeared on right side of forehead after ~10 days of use, suspected metalloproteinase overactivation causing collagen degradation; lines faded during the day but returned each morning

protocol_notes: Used ANAiRUi GHK-cu serum morning and evening for ~10-14 days before noticing adverse effects. Stopped use after ~14 days. Lines were fading by day 4 off product. OP had previously good skin baseline, frequently mistaken for 30-35yo at age 45. Cross-posted to r/30PlusSkinCare and r/SkincareAddiction.
